calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants CK Cleaners Inc., dba Ace Cleaners or Clara Kim.
Defaults were entered against defendants on January 29, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 29, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 10, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants CK Cleaners Inc., dba Ace Cleaners, and Clara Kim as follows:

Damages/Principal - $87,305.59.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,760.08.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $445.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $95,010.67.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment set forth in Exhibit A attached to the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
